title.rendered: Five reasons to consider voting for Travel FX in the British Travel Awards

content.rendered:
As the voting for the British Travel Awards opens, we would like to share with you five reasons why you should vote for Travel FX!

Best Foreign Exchange Company Nominee

Travel FX has been nominated for the Best Foreign Exchange Company award for the fifth consecutive year. This nomination is a testament to our commitment to providing our customers with the best possible service and pricing in the industry. By voting for us, you will be supporting a company that is dedicated to excellence.

 

Competitive Rates

At Travel FX, we offer highly competitive exchange rates for over 60 currencies. We are committed to providing our customers with the best possible rates, and we regularly update our rates to ensure that you get the best value for your money.

No Hidden Fees & No Queueing!

Unlike many other foreign exchange companies, Travel FX has no hidden fees or charges. We believe in transparency and honesty, and we are committed to providing our customers with a fair and consistent service. With Travel FX, what you see is what you get.  Also you can order from the comfort of your own home and have the currency delivered to your door, no queues, no hassel!

Excellent Customer Service

At Travel FX, we pride ourselves on our excellent customer service. Our team of knowledgeable and friendly experts are always available to answer any questions you may have and to provide you with the support you need. We are committed to ensuring that our customers have a positive and stress-free experience when using our services.

Easy and Convenient

Travel FX makes it easy and convenient for you to exchange your currency. Our online platform is user-friendly and easy to navigate, and our ordering process is quick and hassle-free. We also offer free home delivery on orders over £700, so you can have your currency delivered directly to your doorstep.

Basically, Travel FX is a reliable and trustworthy foreign exchange company that offers competitive rates, excellent customer service, and a hassle-free experience. By voting for us in the upcoming British Travel Awards, you will be supporting a company that is committed to providing the best possible service to its customers. So, what are you waiting for? Cast your vote for Travel FX today!

itemListElement.name: Five reasons to consider voting for Travel FX in the British Travel Awards

@graph.name: Travel FX Blog
@graph.description: Travel money news and tips from Travel FX

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
